articles.title: North Adams man convicted, sentenced for murdering his wife in 2022
articles.description:
A jury found Luis Rosado, 53, guilty of first-degree murder. He was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole.

The post North Adams man convicted, sentenced for murdering his wife in 2022 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Luis Rosado, 53, convicted of first-degree murder for killing his wife in 2022.
Rosado sentenced to life in prison without parole, impacting community safety.
Trial highlights domestic violence issues, raising awareness among Boston residents.
